apis.name: PersistentStorage
apis.purpose: Cross-session persistent key-value storage backed by disk, bridging AppStorage to permanent storage for user config and last checkin date

apis.name: AppStorage
apis.purpose: App-level reactive shared state singleton for current user and session data, accessible across all UI components

apis.name: dataPreferences (ohos.data.preferences)
apis.purpose: Key-value preference storage for lightweight persistent settings and counters, backed by XML or GSKV files

apis.name: relationalStore (ohos.data.relationalStore)
apis.purpose: SQL-based relational database (SQLite wrapper) for structured data like courses, reservations, and inventory records

apis.name: @ohos.resourceManager
apis.purpose: Read bundled JSON, media, string, boolean, number resources and rawfile content from the app HAP

apis.name: LocalStorage
apis.purpose: Page-level scoped reactive state storage for component-local or page-isolated UI state

notableFindings: PersistentStorage must be initialized before AppStorage access to correctly bridge persisted data
dataPreferences does not guarantee process concurrency safety - avoid multi-process use
relationalStore single row must be under 2MB due to shared memory limits; large queries (>5000 rows) should use TaskPool
Stage model apps access resourceManager via context.resourceManager without importing the module
LocalStorage is page-scoped; for stage-shared LocalStorage use UIContext.getSharedLocalStorage() from API 12+
Standard JS JSON.parse/stringify are language built-ins, not HarmonyOS APIs
